purpose: Allow-list of EXISTING client-side realtime subscriptions on sensitive tables that lack an explicit server-side `filter:` argument. Rule audit-v6/no-unfiltered-realtime-sensitive blocks NEW unfiltered subscriptions; cleanup of these baselined sites is deferred to a later phase.
spread_suppression_note: Object literals containing a SpreadElement (e.g. `...judgeFilter`) suppress the rule because the canonical R5 per-judge hook injects `filter:` via spread. If a file abuses spread to hide an unfiltered subscription, baseline it here explicitly.

entries.existing_mitigation: Client-side filter: payload checked against current competition_id inside handler.
entries.note: Subscribes to all judging_rounds rows globally. Should add server-side `filter: competition_id=eq.<id>`. Migration deferred.

entries.existing_mitigation: Debounced invalidation (120ms). Per-competition channel name but no server filter — every vote globally fans out.
entries.note: Should add `filter: competition_id=eq.<id>` once vote payload includes it (currently keyed by entry_id).
Admin vote adjustments fan out globally to every viewer. Migrate to filtered subscription.

entries.existing_mitigation: Hook is admin-monitor scope per .lovable/memory/judging/realtime-per-judge-filter-r5.md. Server-side admin RLS still applies.
entries.note: Admin-monitor hook intentionally watches all judges. Should still scope by competition_id/round_id.
Admin-monitor scope. Already filtered for judge_sessions on line 125.

entries.existing_mitigation: Admin-only page; admin RLS on table allows full read.
entries.note: Intentional: admin dashboard watches all admin_notifications.

entries.existing_mitigation: Admin-only mount; RLS on support_tickets allows admin full read.
Admin-only page; RLS allows admin full read.
entries.note: Intentional: admin user management table refresh.
Intentional: admin user management table refresh.

entries.existing_mitigation: Invalidates query caches only; no PII leak — payload contains role grants.
entries.note: Sync hook for admin role/grant changes. Should scope by viewer's user_id when not in admin context.

entries.existing_mitigation: Cache invalidation only; payload itself is not surfaced to UI.
entries.note: Global badge change invalidator. Cache scope > realtime scope.

entries.existing_mitigation: Handler checks payload.new.user_id === self before acting.
entries.note: Should add server-side `filter: user_id=eq.<self>`. Migration deferred.

entries.existing_mitigation: admin_notifications RLS restricts row visibility per role; client only receives rows it can SELECT.
entries.note: Intentional broadcast of admin announcements to all users; relies on RLS for row filtering.
